creator: dal36@gmx.co.uk
text:
I'm seeing the error listed below (section: -- Phase: run-depends) when I try to build sysutils/unetbootin with ports-mgmt/synth. This seems to relate to e2fsprogs-libss or e2fsprogs, but note that this port itself has built and installed correctly. Freebsd version is 12.1-RELEASE-p12.

My understanding is that unetbootin doesn't have any build options, but the build options used for e2fsprogs are as follows:
	ALLTESTS       : off
	BASHTESTS      : off
	DOCS           : on
	FUSEFS         : off
	LIBUNWIND      : off
	NLS            : on
	NOTESTS        : off
	PARALLELTESTS  : off
	SLOWTESTS      : off
	SMALLTESTS     : on

Please let me know if there's any further information that I can provide.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--  Phase: run-depends
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
===>   unetbootin-681 depends on executable: 7z - not found
===>   Installing existing package /packages/All/p7zip-16.02_3.txz
